heading: Compliance by owners as condition of Federal assistance
label: 13601 Compliance by owners as condition of Federal assistance
text: The Secretary of Housing and Urban Development shall require owners of federally assisted housing (as such term is defined in ), as a condition of receiving housing assistance for such housing, to comply with the procedures and requirements established under this subchapter.section 13641(2) of this title
notes: Effective DateChapter applicable upon expiration of 6-month period beginning , except as otherwise provided, see .Oct. 28, 1992section 13642 of this title
